docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO JUL-25-2013 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUN-25-2013 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-25-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-25-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VASQUEZ, DAVID IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT NOVICK, MICHELE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
